ab: marelrang mi iniyam i amalri mukuwa muzangiya kani ama na maralrak a daman.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: mavuli’ tu kuwi ni ama na maralrak.
marengay kaniyam i intaw, mutravelrang tu sa’uv na ruma’.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: a temulre’ay kana sa’uv i intaw mu, mutani kemay kana sa’uv.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: miinurung za ’alum na hung zi za puran i amalri veray kani ama na maralrak.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: i inku zi i ama na maralrak mazayazayar mi i kiya’ezengan, marengay za sazu za vativatiyan i intaw.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: a uwaveruk ku mu, tihasar u lra, zi marekavangsar u lra kema kaninku i ama na maralrak.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: marengay ku, “nu ’inava lra tu kuwi ni ama na maralrak mu, alamu ziya i kaniyam muzangiya.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
